texto: Selling is true fun and the pleasure of selling enjoyed only when someone buys it...Selling and buying are like husband and wife, someone has to sell for someone to buy and vice-versa....Even if both are interesting, sometimes it is closely associated with needs and choice
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Anish Rajan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Selling is true fun and the pleasure of selling enjoyed only when someone buys it...Selling and b…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que negocios, buying, marketing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de marketing e selling.
